summary: Media Validation | Litmus Tool Validation Suite Selection Results
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the Media Validation tile
And the user clicks on the Validation Suite dropdown options
And the user clicks on the Validation selector
And the user clicks on the Run Validation button
Then the user should see the "Litmus" schedule view
And the user should see "Game Pre Provision", "Game Provision", "Game Stream Start", "Game Live", "Game Final", "Game Stream Stop", "Game Stream Archive"
And the user should see the validation match for the pipeline status pre-selected
And the user should see the validation "Result" under the "Validation Suite" with "Validation Suite" Name, and "Validation Result" "Pass/ Fail"

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks on the Media Validation tile 
*And* the user clicks on the Validation Suite dropdown options
*And* the user clicks on the Validation selector
*And* the user clicks on the Run Validation button
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see the "Litmus" schedule view
*And* the user should see "Game Pre Provision", "Game Provision", "Game Stream Start", "Game Live", "Game Final", "Game Stream Stop", "Game Stream Archive" 
*And* the user should see the validation match for the pipeline status pre-selected
*And* the user should see the validation "Result" under the "Validation Suite" with "Validation Suite" Name, and "Validation Result" "Pass/ Fail"
